text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Back in my room, I leaf through my resources on Mejiro Ardan.
choice_data_list:
As I suspected, a sprint on the dirt course isn't a
good idea...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her past scrimmages makes it clear that such a race is
completely outside her aptitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's also true her debut, as well as her racing career, will only be
delayed more if she doesn't run. I completely understand why she's so
worried.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, it hits me. The tryouts are intended for Umamusume who
are looking to be scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh... You want to scout me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Mejiro Ardan already has a trainer, she won't be required to take
place in the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was already interested in her after seeing that spreadsheet, so I
don't mind scouting her at all. This way, she won't have to run in such
a difficult race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well, thank you very much for your interest. I'm truly honored.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: However, I must decline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, please don't misunderstand. My decision has nothing to do with
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I actually plan to reject any and all scouting offers until the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I do hope you'll take the time to stop by and see what I have to offer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, I would hate to be scouted based on anything other than my
abilities.
choice_data_list: But the race you're running is—
But the race you're running is—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Not suited for me? Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then allow me to ask you a question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In the Twinkle Series, will my races always go exactly as planned?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. I cannot control every fine detail of my race agenda,
nor can I control the weather on the day of the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And what if I were forced to race when I'm feeling under the weather,
or the track isn't exactly as I pictured it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: If any one of these many possibilities were present...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Should I give up on winning?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan smiles as she continues.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I understand that others may consider what I am doing extreme, but
well... I don't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, if I allow myself to waver here, who's to say I won't waver
when it truly matters?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once again, I find myself at a loss for words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All I can do is stand in awe of her dedication.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for keeping you so long. Now then, I must be on my
way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I hope to see you again... after the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day forward, I would frequently catch glimpses of Ardan
training for the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Acceleration at the beginning of the race is vital on the dirt course, especially
when it's only 1,200 meters...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I shall prioritize practicing my start. I should also add some
exercises that help me decrease my reaction time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As always, she's carefully calculating the most efficient way to train.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan! Um... The tryouts are approaching, yes? If you'd like, I can
train with you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And that can mean anything! I could run alongside you, we could do
ramps, or maybe we go for a run around town?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Why, thank you, Chiyono O. I appreciate the invitation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I must decline. I was actually wrapping up. If I go any
further, I worry that I'll end up overheating.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah... I-I see! I'm sorry if I bothered you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I imagine it would be quite fun to run with you. Hehe, I'll
just have to make sure I don't hurt myself in my excitement.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What?! A-Ardan... I don't know whether to be happy or scared
hearing that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The fact that she can joke about her frail health astounds me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days pass, and the tryouts finally arrive. Due to heavy rain, the dirt
course looks more suited to mud wrestling. I begin to worry for Mejiro
Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan! Mejiro Ardan rushes forward, chasing the front runner!
Will she catch up before reaching the goal?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Ardan's reached the frontrunner! They're neck and neck! And... goal!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! Mejiro Ardan managed to step forward at the very last
second and win by a hair! Your first-place winner is Mejiro Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: N-no way... But I thought she was a medium-distance runner!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text: M-Mejiro Ardan, could I speak with you?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
D-don't forget me! Your race today was absolutely fabulous. How'd
you like to—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is suddenly swarmed with trainers—as to be expected
after such an amazing race. But they're making it harder for me to
reach her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wrestling my way through the crowd, I finally manage to stand before
Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you...
choice_data_list: It's nice to see you again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... It's nice to see you again too.
choice_data_list: Please, let me be your trainer!
Please, let me be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan falls silent, and I feel her gaze burrow through me. Just
as I begin to feel suffocated by the tension, she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your offer. I'm truly honored.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And... I accept. I look forward to seeing where our journey together
will lead us.
